texto: I wonder what you want from meServed you my heart on a silver platterAnd I watched you devour itEating daintily with your forks and your knivesWatched you stab me downWatched you cut me offAnd during every single second of itI gazed at you with lovedAs you ate your fill of meAnd tossed the rest in the trash
explicacao: Citação de Pyrokardia sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “I wonder what you want from meServed you my heart on a silver platterAnd I watched you devour itE…” articula amor, heartbreak, reflexao em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
